title: Draper 41529 Expert 19.0mm Flat Wood Bit, 19 mm
features: Durable – Manufactured from hardened and properly tempered carbon steel for exceptional strength and durability.
Versatile – Fulfil all your drilling tasks with our drill bit set that is compatible with manual and Power Drills.
Powerful – Ideal precision double ground tri-point for fast waste removal and enhanced cutting performance.
Draper Quality - Reliable Draper Tools quality guaranteed.
description: From the manufacturer Draper About Us We’re an independent family business. It begins with our founder Bert Draper and his wife Emily. In 2019, We celebrate our centenary. Draper is our core range of quality tools which are suitable for enthusiasts and tradespeople alike. Draper 41529 Expert Flat Wood Drill Bit, 19.0mm Ø Expert Quality, flat wood drill bits manufactured from hardened and tempered carbon steel. Draper Expert tools are made for the trade. Each tool in this range has additional features that improve its performance and is manufactured using the best materials available. Draper Tools is a family-run company that has been making high-quality tools for the United Kingdom and beyond for more than 90 years. To bring one the tool one need, the Draper buying team sources innovative products.
